testsuite.name: com.orangeHrm.runners.OrangeHrmMasterRunner

testcase.name: runScenario
testcase.system-out: Execution started for : Access Company General Information and View Company General Details Opened OrangeHRM login page: http://localhost/orangehrm/login.php Submitted login for user: admin Successfully navigated to admin general module Successfully clicked the Edit button Company information details edited successfully Successfully clicked the Save button All company information fields verified successfully ✓ Company 'Wipro' found in database ✓ All company details verified successfully in database ✓ Company information and details verified in database
